---
title: "Publications - The Jo Lab"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: false
---

<div class="page-header"><h1 class="page-header__title">Publications and Preprints</h1></div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=T, results='asis'}

library(dplyr)
library(rcrossref)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
pubs <- read_xlsx("data/publications.xlsx")
citation <- cr_cn(dois = pubs$doi, format = "text", style = "plant-physiology")
my_vector <- unlist(citation)
pubs <- pubs %>%
  mutate(fullref = str_sub(my_vector,1,-1))

# 2. List in order of publication date (Newest first)
pubs <- pubs %>%
  arrange(desc(year))

for (k in sort(unique(pubs$year), decreasing = TRUE)) {
  pubs.year <- pubs %>% filter(year == k)
  cat(paste0('<h4 class="pub-year-heading">', k, '</h4>\n\n'))

  for(i in 1:nrow(pubs.year)) {
    current_ref <- pubs.year$fullref[i]

## Change the Jo L with
    bold_ref <- ifelse(pubs.year$correspondingauthor[i] == "yes" & pubs.year$cofirstauthor[i] == "no",str_replace(current_ref,"Jo L", "<b><u>Jo L</u><sup>†</sup></b>"),ifelse(
                       pubs.year$correspondingauthor[i] == "no" & pubs.year$cofirstauthor[i] == "yes",str_replace(current_ref,"Jo L", "<b><u>Jo L</u><sup>§</sup></b>"),ifelse(
                       pubs.year$correspondingauthor[i] == "yes" & pubs.year$cofirstauthor[i] == "yes",str_replace(current_ref,"Jo L", "<b><u>Jo L</u><sup>†,§</sup></b>"),
                       str_replace(current_ref,"Jo L", "<b><u>Jo L</u></b>"))))

    corr_label <- if(pubs.year$correspondingauthor[i] == "yes") " <b>(<sup>†</sup>Corresponding Author)</b>" else ""
    coauthor_label <- if(pubs.year$cofirstauthor[i] == "yes") " <b>(<sup>§</sup>Co-first author)</b>" else ""

    # 4. Print the formatted lines
    cat(str_glue('
<div class="pub-entry fade-in">
<p>{bold_ref} <span style="font-size:16px;">{corr_label}</span><span style="font-size:16px;">{coauthor_label}</span></p>
</div>
'))
  }
}
```
